average.name: Average value
average.summary: The sum of a set of numbers divided by their count.

direct_proportionality.name: Direct proportionality
direct_proportionality.summary: A relationship of the form y = kx: if x increases n times, y also increases n times.

graph_reading.name: Reading a graph
graph_reading.summary: Finding the value of one quantity from a known value of another using a curve on a graph.

greater_less.name: Greater / less than
greater_less.summary: Comparing two quantities: determining which is greater, lesser, or equal to the other.

probability_basic.name: Probability (basic)
probability_basic.summary: The fraction of favourable outcomes among all possible outcomes. Ranges from 0 (impossible) to 1 (certain).

proportion.name: Proportion
proportion.summary: Equality of two ratios: a/b = c/d. Allows finding an unknown term from three known ones.

inverse_dependence.name: Inverse dependence
inverse_dependence.summary: A relationship of the form y = k/x: if x increases n times, y decreases n times.

difference.name: Difference
difference.summary: The result of subtracting one quantity from another; shows by how much one exceeds the other.
